transcript: I was gonna tell her I was sorry, but then I thought, you know, that's the last thing I needed. Julie Baker thinking I missed her. I see why you like to come out here. Would you mind explaining it to your mother? I love to watch my father paint. Or really, I love to do it.

timestamps.text: I was gonna tell her I was sorry, but then I thought, you know, that's the last thing I needed.
Julie Baker thinking I missed her.
I see why you like to come out here.
Would you mind explaining it to your mother?
I love to watch my father paint. Or really, I love to do it.
